operation.add: ', sort_order = '" . (int)$data['sort_order'] . "', cyberpunks_template = '" . $this->db->escape(isset($data['cyberpunks_template']) ? $data['cyberpunks_template'] : '') . "', date_added = NOW(), date_modified = NOW()");

', sort_order = '" . (int)$data['sort_order'] . "', cyberpunks_template = '" . $this->db->escape(isset($data['cyberpunks_template']) ? $data['cyberpunks_template'] : '') . "', date_modified = NOW() WHERE product_id = '" . (int)$product_id . "'");
